data.title: Jin Medical International Ltd. (NASDAQ: ZJYL) to have fireside chat on Feb 1, 2026 about strategic priorities.
data.description: On January 21, 2026, Jin Medical International Ltd. (NASDAQ: ZJYL), a prominent supplier of rehabilitation medical equipment in China, disclosed plans for a fireside chat on February 1, 2026. The chat will be conducted by key members of the management team and will focus on the Company's strategic objectives and financial structure. The event aims to offer insights into Jin Medical's future direction and capital-related decisions. NASDAQ-listed Jin Medical is recognized for its quality services in the field of rehabilitation medicine.

data.title: Union Bankshares reported $2.7 million net income for Q4 2025, $3.0 million in Q4 2024, and $11.1 million for 2025 earnings. Declared cash dividend.
data.description: On January 21, 2026, Union Bankshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: UNB) released its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2025, and announced a quarterly cash dividend. In the last quarter of 2025, the company reported a consolidated net income of $2.7 million, translating to $0.60 per share. This was a decrease from the $3.0 million, or $0.67 per share, recorded in the same period in 2024. For the entire year of 2025, the net income stood at $11.1 million, or $2.43 per share. This marked an increase from the $8.8 million, or $1.94 per share, reported in 2024. In 2024, earnings were impacted by a strategic balance sheet move, where Union Bank, a subsidiary of Union Bankshares, Inc., sold $38.8 million worth of lower-yielding available-for-sale debt securities, incurring a pre-tax realized loss of $1.3 million, recorded in the third quarter of that year.

data.title: Polymarket predicts Gold has a 47% chance, Bitcoin 39%, and S&P 500 14% to be best performing asset in 2026. Gold is up 12.6% year-to-date.
data.description: According to Polymarket traders, the chances of gold being the top-performing asset in 2026 are 47%, while Bitcoin stands at 39% and the S&P 500 at 14%. Gold has seen a 12.6% increase year-to-date, moving from $4,321 per ounce on January 1 to $4,840 on Wednesday, reaching a peak of $4,887 earlier in the period. This data suggests a positive trend for gold compared to Bitcoin and the S&P 500 for the remainder of the year. Detailed information can be found on the Benzinga website.

data.title: Online training course on Supplier Qualification in Life Science on May 6th-7th, 2026, offers 12 CPD hours. Strengthen quality systems in pharmaceutical, biotechnology, medical device industries. Regulatory compliance emphasized.
data.description: In Dublin, a valuable training course titled "Best Practices for Supplier Qualification in Life Science" is scheduled to take place on May 6th to May 7th, 2026. This course has been newly included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The training will focus on conducting in-depth supplier qualifications and audits to enhance the quality systems within pharmaceutical, biotechnology, and medical device manufacturing sectors. Emphasizing the importance of suppliers meeting quality standards, the course aims to equip professionals with the necessary skills to ensure consistency in compliance with regulatory bodies like the FDA.
